Story: This role is a continuation of the previous one, but with a focus on Enterprise clients. Responsible for both coordination and technical work within the network team. Technical in-depth network and system troubleshooting. Installing and configuring network equipment. Manage Intune environments. Maintaining server and network infrastructure. Implementing security-related adjustments in IT as in OT. Supplying internal support for colleagues. Working with other departments to develop proposals for new implementations. Drafting documentation and procedures with a focus on networking. Together with the team, I seek possible solutions for specific and challenging problems. Coordination of team efforts, communication, and alignment with colleagues inside and outside the team. Knowledge transfer within (and outside) the team.

Onsite implementation of IT equipment or services in the BeNeLux and France, the SME world. Carrying out IT maintenance on-site at customers' premises. In case of technical urgent intervention from escalations perfom onsite repairs. Due to the trend of Onprem to Cloud, migrations to the Cloud, with a focus on Microsoft 365 stack. Integration VoiP solutions. Supplying internal support for colleagues. Combining this role with system- and network administration.

Maintaining software and hardware. Troubleshooting and resolving in-depth technical problems. Configuring firewalls and routers. Managing Windows Server environments. Managing network environments. Creating scripts for automation or recurring  issues. Performance monitoring and tweaking on everything related to network and Windows server infrastructure. Backup management. Maintaining technical documentation and platforms for management. Integration of Avaya IP Office.
The initial experiences in the IT world. First-line servicedesk support. Repairs of various hardware. Proactively updating, maintaining software an documentation.
